quotes.text: Any application that can be written in JavaScript, will eventually be written in JavaScript.
quotes.author: Jeff Atwood

quotes.text: The heaviest objects in the universe: neutron stars, black holes, and node_modules.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: TypeScript is just JavaScript wearing a trench coat and fake mustache pretending to be a serious language.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best JavaScript is the JavaScript you don't write. Use TypeScript instead.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Maybe I’m taking crazy pills, but I’m still stuck on “why the hell does a TUI need to run in terminal React by way of JavaScript” The fact that Anthropic felt the need to buy a runtime so they could make their TUI better speaks more to the quality of engineering than anything else IMO. If rewrites are so easy, why not rewrite CC in a native language? Would’ve been a hell of a lot cheaper.
quotes.author: weakfish
quotes.source: Hacker News — Claude Code uses Bun written in Rust now
quotes.extraction_note: Humorous critique of unnecessary complexity in software toolchains, with a grug-brained call for simplicity.
